zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏弱
zh.content:
当前艾达币价格徘徊在0.1606美元附近，较SMA(20)0.1613略低，显示短期均线压力仍存在。价格在0.1605-0.1611区间内波动，市场缺乏明显方向性，多空力量相对均衡，短线偏向震荡整理。  

MACD指标当前为-0.0010，虽数值不大，但处于零轴下方，表明多头动能不足，空方仍具一定优势。若MACD出现回升并向零轴靠近，则可能触发短线反弹，但持续性仍需关注成交量变化。  

支撑位初步锁定在0.1605美元附近，该位置若被有效守住，则可能形成短线底部；阻力位在0.1613-0.1615美元区间，突破难度较大，需等待更多买盘确认。若跌破支撑，进一步下行空间可能扩展至0.1598美元。  

综合来看，短线操作建议以低位逢低试探为主，避免追高开仓；日内可关注支撑反弹机会，止损控制在支撑下方0.1603美元；若价格有效突破阻力，可考虑轻仓跟进，多单需严格控制仓位以防回落风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano is trading at 0.160596, holding slightly below its 20-period simple moving average at 0.161272. The narrow daily range between 0.160496 and 0.161141, combined with a nearly flat 24-hour change, suggests a market lacking strong directional conviction. Price action remains mildly bearish in the short term, as ADA/USD continues to struggle beneath the moving average, indicating that sellers maintain a modest advantage despite limited volatility.

Momentum indicators provide a cautious outlook. The MACD value of -0.0010 points to lingering negative momentum, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. With RSI data unavailable, price structure and moving-average positioning become more important. The fact that ADA remains below the SMA(20) suggests that recent buying pressure has not yet been sufficient to reverse the prevailing short-term weakness.

From a technical perspective, immediate support is located near the session low at 0.1605. A decisive break below this level could expose additional downside pressure and potentially trigger further selling activity. On the upside, resistance is developing around 0.1611, followed by the SMA(20) region near 0.1613. A sustained move above these levels would improve sentiment and could encourage short-term buyers to re-enter the market.

For traders, a conservative approach may be appropriate until a clearer directional signal emerges. Bullish participants could look for confirmation through a breakout above 0.1613 accompanied by stronger momentum, while bearish traders may monitor any breakdown beneath 0.1605 for continuation opportunities. Given the compressed trading range and weak momentum readings, disciplined risk management remains essential, as false breakouts can occur frequently in low-volatility environments. Overall, the near-term bias remains slightly bearish unless ADA can reclaim and hold above its short-term moving average.
